name: Chicken and Stuffing Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium heat in a skillet.
2. Mix flour, paprika, and 1/2 teaspoon pepper.
3. Coat the chicken with the flour mixture.
4. Cook the chicken in the oil over medium heat for 15 to 20 minutes or until browned.
5. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
6. Place the chicken in an ungreased 2-1/2 quart casserole or square baking dish, 9x9x2 inches.
7. Pour soup over the chicken.
8. Add the remaining ingredients.
9. Mound the mixture on top of the chicken.
10. Cover and bake for 1 hour to 1 hour 15 minutes or until the chicken is done.
Serves: 6
